data.reasoningText:
This project uses `packages.config` format, which is the legacy NuGet package management format. To convert to CPM (Central Package Management), I need to:

1. First convert from `packages.config` to `PackageReference` format in the `.csproj` file
2. Then set up CPM with a `Directory.Packages.props` file

Let me check if there's already a `Directory.Packages.props` in the parent directory.

data.content:
This project uses the legacy `packages.config` format. CPM requires `PackageReference` format first, so I'll need to:

1. Convert `packages.config` → `PackageReference` in the `.csproj`
2. Create `Directory.Packages.props` with centralized versions
3. Remove versions from the `.csproj` `PackageReference` entries
4. Delete `packages.config`

Let me do all of this now:

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-1f2b9d206750423da8e487f52914c76a/simple-packages-config/LegacyApp/LegacyApp.csproj", "old_str": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.8</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="Newtonsoft.Json, Version=13.0.0.0">
      <HintPath>..\packages\Newtonsoft.Json.13.0.3\lib\net45\Newtonsoft.Json.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>", "new_str": "<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net48</TargetFramework>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>"}

+  <PropertyGroup>
+    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
+  </PropertyGroup>
+  <ItemGroup>
+    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
+  </ItemGroup>
+</Project>
+

data.content: Let me verify the final state:

Done. Here's what I did:

1. **Converted `.csproj`** from legacy `packages.config`-style (with `ToolsVersion`, `HintPath` references) to SDK-style with `PackageReference` (no version — managed centrally)
2. **Created `Directory.Packages.props`** at the solution root with `ManagePackageVersionsCentrally=true` and `Newtonsoft.Json` version `13.0.3`
3. **Deleted `packages.config`** — no longer needed
